chapter_title.en: Amīr al-mu’minīn on property sharers and accidents

text: ۳۳۵. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ فِى مَالِهِ شَرِيكَانِ، الْوَارِثُ وَالْحَوَادِثُ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 335. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: There are two sharers in the property of every person — successors and accidents.
